title: Fishing Indicators
description: Displays a timer indicating when your fishing hook will catch an item.
body:
Displays a timer indicating when your fishing hook will catch an item. The mod works
only when playing on singleplayer, or when the server you are playing on also has the mod installed.

![A GIF displaying a radial indicator near a fishing hook](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ascpixi/fishingindicators/master/etc/demo.gif)

Fishing Indicators supports both NeoForge and Fabric, for Minecraft 1.21.5 and above. In order to install it, you will need the [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) mod installed as well.
